# CWE-305 — Authentication Bypass by Primary Weakness (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-305-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Vulnerable: debug flag in query skips JWT middleware entirely.
func AdminDashboard(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	if c.Query("debug") == "1" {
		db.Exec("UPDATE settings SET maintenance = 1")
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"maintenance": true})
		return
	}
	if c.GetString("jwt_sub") == "" {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "auth"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"panel": "admin"})
}
